creator: wolfgang@lyxys.ka.sub.org
text:
upgraded port mozilla+ipv6 using portupgrade to 0.9.7,1
        When starting installed binary, the programm insists on user to
        select a profile. Select box has "Default User" as pre-existing
        entry; if this is selected, programm complains about not finding
        the profile folder. Deleting "Default User" from select box is
        possible. Selecting "Create Profile" brings up a window that shows
        an empty select box for the Profile folder and it is impossible to
        enter anything into the folder select box. The "default"-boxes are
        inactive and can not be selected. Entering a filename into the
        filename-inputfield is possible, but creation of profile fails
        because the profile folder is not found.
        Problem persists after make deinstall; make clean; make install
        so it is probably not related to the portupgrade procedure.
        Removing ~/.mozilla does not make a difference

How-To-Repeat: 	Install port mozilla+ipv6, start mozilla
